name: Zscaler Deception
description: Distributed deception platform integrated with Zscaler Zero Trust Exchange for detecting compromised users, lateral movement, and insider threats using endpoint and network decoys

auth_config.description: OAuth2 bearer token from Zscaler API authentication

actions.name: List Decoys
actions.description: List all deployed decoys including endpoint landmines, AD decoys, and TI decoys

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by decoy type: endpoint, ad, threat_intel, network

actions.name: List Deception Alerts
actions.description: List high-fidelity alerts from attacker interactions with decoys and breadcrumbs

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity: critical, high, medium, low

actions.name: Get Alert Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed alert information including attacker actions, source IP, and compromised credentials

actions.name: List Breadcrumbs
actions.description: List deployed breadcrumbs and lures on endpoints including fake credentials, files, and processes

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by breadcrumb type: credential, file, process, registry

actions.name: Get Incident Summary
actions.description: Retrieve a summary of deception incidents with attacker intelligence

parameters.name: timeRange
parameters.description: Time range: last_24h, last_7d, last_30d, custom
